required: What industry or product is the market analysis for? Is the scope defined?

effortModel.citation: 15-min presentation = 8-10 slides (1.5 min/slide); 3+ solo practice runs + 1 team rehearsal

expectedStrategy: Day 7-8: practice runs with timer (3+ solo runs — 2hr)
Day 9-10: polish + team rehearsal + final submission — 2hr
warnings: schedule team rehearsal date by Day 8 — team schedules are the biggest variable
if scope undefined → research phase needs to be extended (Days 1-4)
alternatives: if scope already clear: fast-track to Day 1 outline and Day 2 research start
hardFailChecks: must NOT plan for the entire group — own part only
must include a dedicated practice stage (not just research + slides)
must NOT skip team rehearsal recommendation
toneExpectation: organized, proactive, team-aware; emphasize solo practice before team rehearsal
